summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lead Routing Module v1 - all backend APIs working correctly with auto-assignment, load balancing, and routing rules functionality

fixed_bugs.issue: Cast to ObjectId failed for UUID manager IDs
fixed_bugs.fix: Removed _id query from manager lookup, using only custom id field

passed_tests: GET /api/lead-routing/rules - routing rules retrieval (4 default rules found)
POST /api/leads - lead creation with auto-assignment via VIP Leads rule
Routing rules CRUD operations (create, read, update, toggle, delete)
Workload score calculation verification (activeLeads * 2 + openTasks + overdueTasks * 3)
Assignment history recording with correct strategy and reason fields
